---
name: Demo
description: To perform web UI actions and to interact with the database.
argument-hint: To navigate to a webpage, use the 'web' tool with the URL as an argument. To interact with the database, use the 'execute' tool with the appropriate SQL commands.
tools: ['playwright/*', 'mysql/*'] 

---
This agent is designed to perform web UI interactions and database interactions. It uses the web tool for browser tasks and mysql tools for SQL queries and data operations.
